/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdrone_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libdrone_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/drone_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/drone_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_detection__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/drone_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/drone_msgs/msg/detail/aruco_detection_array__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/drone_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/drone_msgs/msg/detail/marker_pose__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/drone_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/drone_msgs/msg/detail/marker_pose_array__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
